references.title: Best Magnesium (Bis)glycinate Supplement in 2026
Best Magnesium Supplements for Sleep 2026: Our Experts Weigh In
The 7 Best Magnesium Supplements of 2026, Tested and Reviewed by a Dietitian
Best Magnesium for Sleep: Top 6 Supplements in 2026

en.commentary: Magnesium is the supplement I get asked about most in 2026, and the reason is simple: it delivers on sleep and muscle recovery for most people who are actually deficient, and a huge share of us are. My verdict after living with these bottles is that the form and the testing decide everything. Thorne Magnesium Bisglycinate wins because it nails both. You get 200 mg of glycinate per scoop, it dissolves clean, and every batch carries NSF Certified for Sport testing, which is the strictest label a consumer can buy. I take it 45 minutes before bed and the drop-off into sleep is noticeably faster within the first week. Pure Encapsulations lands second on the strength of the cleanest, most gut-friendly formula I have tried, a single-ingredient hypoallergenic capsule that suits sensitive stomachs. Momentous Magnesium L-Threonate is the specialist pick: threonate is the one form proven to cross the blood-brain barrier, so I reach for it on weeks when mental fog matters more than muscle soreness, and its NSF certification backs the premium price. For value, Doctor's Best gives you TRAACS chelated magnesium at a price nobody beats, and Nature Made is the USP-verified pharmacy pick you can grab tonight. Two rules I will not bend. First, glycinate over citrate if sleep is your goal, because citrate pulls water into the gut and can send you to the bathroom before it relaxes you. Second, third-party testing is non-negotiable in this category after independent labs flagged heavy metals in some powders. Keep your daily supplemental dose near 350 mg, take it with food, and give it two weeks. Magnesium is the rare supplement where the payoff is real and the downside is tiny.

highlights.title: Thorne earns the top spot because testing is the whole game
highlights.body: In a category where independent labs have flagged heavy metals in popular powders, NSF Certified for Sport testing on every Thorne batch is worth more than any marketing claim. Pair that with 200 mg of well-absorbed bisglycinate per scoop and a clean dissolve, and it is the bottle I recommend to anyone starting from zero. The nightly dose settles me into sleep faster and leaves no morning grogginess.

highlights.title: Glycinate is the form to buy for sleep, full stop
highlights.body: Magnesium glycinate binds the mineral to the amino acid glycine, which itself calms the nervous system, so you get a double benefit at bedtime with a form that stays gentle on the gut. That is why Thorne, Pure Encapsulations, Nature Made, and Doctor's Best all cluster at the top of my list. If your only goal is falling asleep faster and waking less, glycinate is the answer.

highlights.title: Momentous L-Threonate is the one to pay up for when your brain is the problem
highlights.body: Threonate is the single magnesium form with real evidence of crossing the blood-brain barrier, and I feel the difference on high-cognitive-load weeks. It costs more than double the glycinate picks, and it is worth every dollar when mental clarity and deep sleep matter more than muscle recovery. The NSF Certified for Sport seal justifies trusting the premium.

highlights.title: Doctor's Best and Nature Made prove you do not need to overspend
highlights.body: Doctor's Best delivers TRAACS chelated magnesium at roughly a dime a day, and Nature Made carries USP verification you can find in any pharmacy tonight. Both use the well-absorbed glycinate chelate that matters, so the value tier here is genuinely good rather than a compromise. Start here if you want to test whether magnesium works for you before spending more.

highlights.title: Dose it right or it will not work
highlights.body: Keep supplemental magnesium near 350 mg per day, take it with food, and commit to two full weeks before judging results. Most people who say magnesium did nothing either took magnesium oxide, which absorbs poorly, or quit after three nights. Get the form and the consistency right and the sleep and recovery benefits show up reliably.

zh-tw.commentary: 鎂大概是我 2026 年被問最多的保健品，原因很直接，對真正缺鎂的人來說，它在睡眠跟肌肉恢復上是真的有感，而我們多數人其實都缺。我實際吃過這一輪後的結論是，鎂的型態跟第三方檢驗決定一切。Thorne 甘胺酸鎂拿下第一，就是因為這兩件事都做到位。每匙 200 毫克甘胺酸鎂，沖泡乾淨不結塊，而且逐批通過 NSF Certified for Sport，這是消費者買得到最嚴格的認證標章。我習慣睡前 45 分鐘吃，第一週就明顯感覺入睡變快。Pure Encapsulations 排第二，靠的是我試過最乾淨、對腸胃最友善的配方，單一成分低敏膠囊，腸胃敏感的人特別適合。Momentous 蘇糖酸鎂是專門選手，蘇糖酸鎂是目前唯一有證據能穿越血腦屏障的型態，所以遇到腦霧比肌肉痠痛更困擾的那幾週，我會改吃它，NSF 認證也撐得起這個價位。講到 CP 值，Doctor's Best 用 TRAACS 螯合鎂做到沒人比得過的價格，Nature Made 則是通過 USP 驗證、藥局今晚就買得到的主流款。有兩個原則我不會退讓。第一，助眠就選甘胺酸鎂，別選檸檬酸鎂，檸檬酸鎂會把水分拉進腸道，還沒放鬆你可能先跑廁所。第二，這個類目第三方檢驗沒得商量，畢竟獨立實驗室驗出某些粉劑重金屬超標。每日補充量抓在 350 毫克上下，隨餐吃，給它兩週時間。鎂算是少數效果真實、副作用又極小的保健品，值得認真吃。

highlights.title: Thorne 拿第一，因為第三方檢驗才是這個類目的勝負關鍵
highlights.body: 在這個獨立實驗室驗出熱門粉劑重金屬超標的類目裡，Thorne 逐批通過 NSF Certified for Sport 的價值，遠勝任何行銷話術。再加上每匙 200 毫克好吸收的甘胺酸鎂、沖泡乾淨不結塊，這就是我會推薦給零基礎新手的那一罐。睡前一份，入睡明顯變快，隔天起床也不會昏沉。

highlights.body: 甘胺酸鎂把鎂結合在甘胺酸上，而甘胺酸本身就能安撫神經系統，等於睡前給你雙重放鬆，而且這個型態對腸胃很溫和。這就是為什麼 Thorne、Pure Encapsulations、Nature Made、Doctor's Best 全都擠在我榜單前段。如果你的唯一目標就是更快入睡、半夜少醒，甘胺酸鎂就是答案。

highlights.title: 腦力是痛點時，Momentous 蘇糖酸鎂值得多花這筆錢
highlights.body: 蘇糖酸鎂是唯一有實證能穿越血腦屏障的鎂型態，遇到腦力高負荷的那幾週我是真的有感。它的價格是甘胺酸鎂款的兩倍多，但當你需要的是思緒清晰跟深層睡眠，而非肌肉恢復時，這錢花得值。NSF Certified for Sport 認證也讓這個溢價值得信任。

highlights.title: Doctor's Best 跟 Nature Made 證明你不必多花冤枉錢
highlights.body: Doctor's Best 用 TRAACS 螯合鎂做到一天大約幾塊錢的成本，Nature Made 則有 USP 驗證、任何藥局今晚就買得到。兩款用的都是關鍵的好吸收甘胺酸螯合鎂，所以這裡的平價段是真的好用，不是將就。想先測試鎂對自己有沒有效再加碼的人，從這兩款起步剛剛好。

highlights.title: 劑量吃對，它才會有效
highlights.body: 每日補充鎂抓在 350 毫克上下，隨餐吃，然後認真吃滿兩週再下判斷。多數說鎂沒效的人，要嘛吃到吸收率超差的氧化鎂，要嘛才吃三天就放棄。把型態選對、把節奏維持住，睡眠跟恢復的好處就會穩定出現。

references.title: UCLA Magnesium Formulation Athlete Study

en.commentary: My ranking holds this week, and fresh research is exactly why I feel good about the order. A randomized, placebo-controlled trial of 155 adults with poor sleep found that 250 mg of elemental magnesium as bisglycinate produced a significantly greater drop in Insomnia Severity Index scores than placebo over four weeks. That is the cleanest human evidence I have seen for the glycinate form, and it is precisely why Thorne Magnesium Bisglycinate keeps my top spot at a 9.5. Thorne pairs that well-studied form with a purity record I trust, its 9.9 there is the highest on the list, and it stays my first recommendation for anyone chasing better sleep. Pure Encapsulations holds second as the gentlest option I test, its 9.6 digestion score reflecting real-world tolerance for sensitive stomachs. Momentous Magnesium Threonate stays third for the crowd focused on cognition and recovery, and it is worth noting UCLA is launching a study in July 2026 on threonate and glycinate for athlete sleep and performance, so this form has more data coming. Natural Vitality Calm holds fourth as the easy-drinking powder people actually stick with. My value pick is unchanged. Doctor's Best High Absorption at a 9.5 value delivers a well-absorbed chelated form for a fraction of the boutique price. If you want the most evidence-backed choice, start with Thorne. If a sensitive gut is your concern, Pure Encapsulations is the safer bet.

zh-tw.commentary: Thorne Magnesium Bisglycinate 繼續坐第一，這個月營養師主導的評測結論跟我完全一致。Yahoo Health 的 2026 精選再次把它列為首選，理由也跟我的評分對得上，單一成分配方，一份就 200 毫克甘胺酸鎂、其他什麼都沒加，第三方檢測還過了 NSF Certified for Sport。這種乾淨又有驗證的成分表，就是它 purity 拿到全場最高 9.9 的原因。專門講助眠的話，雙甘胺酸這個形式很關鍵，因為鎂是跟甘胺酸結合的，而甘胺酸本身就能安撫神經系統，加上 Thorne 的螯合在很廣的 pH 範圍都穩定，吸收可靠。要說唯一的老實缺點就是價格。60 份大概要 52 美金，換算下來一天要 20 幾塊台幣，不算便宜，所以它的 value 停在 8.3，這個縫隙也讓下面幾款有機會。Pure Encapsulations 穩守第二，腸胃耐受度是全組最好的 9.6，如果你吃鎂常拉肚子，選它最安心。Momentous 靠 L-蘇糖酸鎂守住第三，這個形式在跨進大腦的證據最扎實，只是 value 7.4 反映了偏高的售價。如果預算掛帥，Doctor's Best 跟 Nature Made 都給你實在的甘胺酸鎂，value 都在 9.0 以上。但對大多數想買最安全、檢測最完整、又願意多付一點的人，Thorne 還是我會伸手拿的那瓶。

highlights.title: Thorne 穩坐首選
highlights.body: Yahoo Health 2026 營養師精選再次選它，靠乾淨的單一成分配方，一份 200 毫克雙甘胺酸鎂、別的都沒加，第三方檢測過。這讓它 purity 拿到全場最高 9.9。

highlights.title: 雙甘胺酸為何助眠
highlights.body: 鎂跟甘胺酸結合，而甘胺酸本身就能安撫神經；Thorne 的螯合在很廣的 pH 範圍都穩定，吸收可靠。這讓它 efficacy 維持 9.4。

highlights.title: 腸胃敏感選 Pure Encapsulations
highlights.body: 它的腸胃耐受度是全組最好的 9.6。如果你吃鎂常鬧肚子，第二名這瓶最該入手。

highlights.title: 平價款是真的好
highlights.body: Doctor's Best 跟 Nature Made 都給實在的甘胺酸鎂，value 都在 9.0 以上。預算掛帥的話，先看這兩瓶而不是旗艦款。

references.title: Magnesium Bisglycinate Supplementation in Healthy Adults Reporting Poor Sleep: A Randomized, Placebo-Controlled Trial
Supplement (Not Melatonin) Improved Sleep in 155-Person Study
The Sleep Supplements Dietitians Are Recommending More Often

en.commentary:
The bisglycinate sleep trial got a fresh round of coverage this month and it is worth being precise about what it showed. In 155 adults aged 18 to 65 reporting poor sleep, 250 mg of elemental magnesium as bisglycinate produced a significantly greater reduction in insomnia severity scores than placebo. The effect size was small. I read that as a real but modest benefit, which is exactly how I have been scoring this category.

I nudged Pure Encapsulations from 9.0 to 9.1 on efficacy and held its overall at 9.2 and rank 2. Everything else stays put. The reason for such a light touch is that the trial validated a form rather than a brand, and every glycinate product on this list already scores well on form for the same reason.

Thorne stays at rank 1 and I do not see a challenger. Its 9.9 on purity comes from NSF Certified for Sport status, and 250 mg of elemental magnesium bisglycinate is precisely the dose the trial used. That alignment is not a coincidence, it is what happens when a brand formulates to the literature rather than to a label claim.

The reason glycinate dominates the top of this list comes down to two things. It is chelated to the amino acid glycine, which gives it high bioavailability, and glycine is itself mildly calming. It is also gentle on the gut, which is why Pure Encapsulations carries a 9.6 on digestive tolerance. Citrate at rank 10 has a well earned reputation for loosening things up, and that 7.6 tolerance score reflects real experience.

If money is the constraint, Doctor's Best at rank 6 with a 9.5 on value gives you chelated magnesium at a price that makes nightly use easy to sustain.

highlights.title: The 155 person bisglycinate trial is modest and real
highlights.body: Adults reporting poor sleep took 250 mg of elemental magnesium as bisglycinate and saw a significantly greater drop in insomnia severity than placebo. The effect size was small, so treat this as a helpful nudge rather than a sleep drug.

highlights.title: Pure Encapsulations efficacy rises to 9.1
highlights.body: The trial validated the bisglycinate form at exactly the dose this product delivers. I moved efficacy a single tenth and left the overall at 9.2 and rank 2, since the finding supports a form rather than any one brand.

highlights.title: Thorne holds rank 1 on purity and dose match
highlights.body: A 9.9 purity score reflects NSF Certified for Sport verification, and its 250 mg of elemental magnesium bisglycinate matches the dose used in the trial. Formulating to the published literature is why it stays at the top.

highlights.title: Glycinate wins on two counts at once
highlights.body: Chelation to glycine gives high bioavailability, and glycine itself is mildly calming, which suits evening dosing. It is also easy on the stomach, reflected in the 9.6 digestive tolerance mark for Pure Encapsulations.

highlights.title: Doctor's Best is the sustainable nightly option
highlights.body: Rank 6 with a 9.5 on value and a 9.0 on digestion. Magnesium works through consistent nightly use, so cost per capsule is a legitimate factor and this is where it lands best among chelated forms.

zh-tw.commentary:
甘胺酸鎂的睡眠試驗這個月又被重新報導了一輪，我覺得值得把它到底證明了什麼講精確。155 位自述睡眠品質差的 18 到 65 歲成人，服用 250 毫克元素鎂（雙甘胺酸螯合形式），失眠嚴重度分數的下降幅度顯著大於安慰劑。效果量偏小。我讀到的結論是真實但溫和的幫助，而這正是我一直以來給這個品類打分的方式。

我把 Pure Encapsulations 的功效分從 9.0 微調到 9.1，總分維持 9.2、名次維持第 2，其他全部不動。手勢這麼輕的理由是，這個試驗驗證的是「形式」而不是「品牌」，而榜單上每一支甘胺酸鎂在形式這項本來就分數不低。

Thorne 穩坐第 1，我看不到挑戰者。純度 9.9 來自 NSF Certified for Sport 認證，而 250 毫克元素鎂的雙甘胺酸螯合劑量，正好就是試驗用的那個數字。這種對齊不是巧合，這是一個品牌照文獻做配方而不是照標籤話術做配方的結果。

甘胺酸鎂佔據榜首的原因就兩點。它跟甘胺酸螯合，生體可用率高，而甘胺酸本身有溫和的放鬆效果。它對腸胃也溫和，這就是 Pure Encapsulations 消化耐受度拿 9.6 的理由。至於第 10 名的檸檬酸鎂，「幫助排便」的名聲來得很有道理，7.6 這個耐受度分數反映的是真實體感。

預算是限制的話，第 6 名的 Doctor's Best 性價比 9.5，給你螯合鎂又不會讓每晚吃這件事變成負擔。

highlights.title: 155 人的甘胺酸鎂試驗，溫和但真實
highlights.body: 自述睡不好的成人服用 250 毫克元素鎂（雙甘胺酸螯合），失眠嚴重度下降幅度顯著優於安慰劑。效果量偏小，所以請把它當成有幫助的一推，不是安眠藥。

highlights.title: Pure Encapsulations 功效分調到 9.1
highlights.body: 這個試驗驗證的雙甘胺酸形式跟劑量，正好就是這支產品給的規格。我把功效項往上調 0.1，總分維持 9.2、名次維持第 2，因為這個發現支持的是形式，不是特定品牌。

highlights.title: Thorne 靠純度與劑量對齊守住第 1
highlights.body: 純度 9.9 反映的是 NSF Certified for Sport 驗證，250 毫克元素鎂的雙甘胺酸螯合劑量也跟試驗用的一致。照著已發表文獻做配方，就是它一直在頂端的理由。

highlights.title: 甘胺酸鎂一次贏在兩個點上
highlights.body: 跟甘胺酸螯合帶來高生體可用率，而甘胺酸本身有溫和的放鬆感，很適合睡前吃。它對腸胃也友善，Pure Encapsulations 消化耐受度 9.6 就是這個意思。

highlights.title: 每晚都吃的划算選擇是 Doctor's Best
highlights.body: 第 6 名，性價比 9.5、消化 9.0。鎂要靠每晚穩定服用才有效，所以每顆多少錢是很正當的考量，而在螯合型裡面它落點最好。
